problem_summary: BMP4 single-ligand gradient response across four cell lines, with BOED-ready shared context but no execution candidate selected yet.

latent_spec.notes: The shared bundle keeps latent structure abstract. Family-specific latent parameterizations are defined in the local Hill and multireceptor Pyro modules.

observation_spec.notes: Each dose-response trajectory contains 11 BMP4 conditions for one cell line.

hints.notes: This bundle captures shared BMP4 context, data locations, literature sources, and candidate family names. Execution wiring for literature-informed fitting and BOED is handled locally by examples/agent/bmp4_gradient_agent.py and the nearby BMP4 helper modules.

data.observed_data_summary: Normalized and raw BMP4 gradient observations for NMuMG, BMPR2_KD, ACVR1_KD, and BMPR1A_KD.

metadata.theta_format: Either a mapping with keys bottom, top, ec50, hill_n or a flat length-4 vector in that order.
A mapping with keys kd, receptor_abundance, receptor_weight, top, bottom, s50, response_hill.

candidates.name: multireceptor_hierarchical_pyro
candidates.description: Joint hierarchical Pyro multireceptor model with shared receptor parameters, cell-line-specific abundances, qPCR observation layer, and response readout.

metadata.theta_format: Joint Pyro latent state across receptors and selected cell lines.

candidates.name: promisys_onestep_lfiax
candidates.description: Simulator-based promisys one-step trimeric BMP4 model with one ligand, two type I receptors, and three type II receptors.

metadata.theta_format: Flat length-12 normalized vector: six one-step affinities followed by six phosphorylation efficiencies, ordered by type I receptor then type II receptor.

candidates.name: promisys_twostep_lfiax
candidates.description: Simulator-based promisys two-step trimeric BMP4 model with one ligand, two type I receptors, and three type II receptors.

metadata.theta_format: Flat length-15 normalized vector: two dimer affinities, six trimer affinities, six phosphorylation efficiencies, and one normalized observation-noise scale.
